# opnsense_system_vlan (Resource)

Manages a VLAN on OPNsense.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_system_vlan" "mgmt" {
  parent_interface = "vtnet0"
  tag              = 100
  device           = "vlan0100"
  description      = "Management VLAN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device` (String) VLAN device name (e.g., `vlan0100`).
- `parent_interface` (String) Parent interface (e.g., `vtnet0`).
- `tag` (Number) VLAN tag (1-4094).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `priority` (Number) Priority code point (0-7).
- `proto` (String) VLAN protocol. Empty for auto, `802.1q`, or `802.1ad`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the VLAN.

## Import

```shell
terraform import opnsense_system_vlan.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
